recentPosts.caption:
Most agencies figure it out as they go. New play every client, new strategy every quarter, month six ends up feeling like month one.

We don't work that way. Every GLV client gets walked through the same five-step playbook. Same process, every time. That's how the work actually compounds.

Comment PROCESS for the doc.

#NorthernOntario #SaultSteMarie #MarketingStrategy

Three vendors. Four invoices. Nobody's strategy actually fits together.

That's the small-business marketing default in 2026, and it costs you twice. Once on the retainers, again on the meetings trying to align them.

GLV runs all six channels under one roof. One team, one strategy that compounds.
